SEARCH
Package neqsim.process.fielddevelopment.evaluation

Class ReservesClassification

java.lang.Object
neqsim.process.fielddevelopment.evaluation.ReservesClassification
All Implemented Interfaces:
Serializable
public final class ReservesClassification extends Object implements Serializable
Rule-based SPE-PRMS / NPD resource classification helper.

Maps a discrete project maturity stage onto the high-level petroleum resource categories defined by the Petroleum Resources Management System (SPE-PRMS) and used by the Norwegian Petroleum Directorate (NPD/Sokkeldirektoratet):

SPE-PRMS resource categories used by this helper
Category PRMS class Description
RESERVES 1-3 Discovered, commercial, recoverable
CONTINGENT_RESOURCES 4-6 Discovered, sub-commercial, recoverable
PROSPECTIVE_RESOURCES 7+ Undiscovered, potentially recoverable
UNRECOVERABLE n/a Maturity stage not recognised

This is a deterministic mapping aid, not a volumetric estimate. It does not assign volumes, recovery factors, or chance of commerciality. A formal SPE-PRMS or NPD estimate with qualified subsurface review is required for project decisions.

Version:
1.0
Author:
NeqSim Community

      public ReservesClassification()

  • Method Details

    • classify

      public ReservesClassification.Result classify(String maturityStage)
      Classifies a maturity stage assuming commerciality is unknown.
      Parameters:
      maturityStage - the project maturity stage (e.g. "on production", "development pending", "prospect"); must be non-null and non-blank
      Returns:
      the ReservesClassification.Result of the classification
      Throws:
      IllegalArgumentException - if maturityStage is null or blank

    • classify

      public ReservesClassification.Result classify(String maturityStage, Boolean commercial)
      Classifies a maturity stage against the SPE-PRMS categories.
      Parameters:
      maturityStage - the project maturity stage (e.g. "on production", "development pending", "prospect"); must be non-null and non-blank
      commercial - whether the volumes are judged commercial; may be null when unknown. When Boolean.FALSE on a reserves-stage input the warning is raised to "watch" because reserves require commercial volumes.
      Returns:
      the ReservesClassification.Result of the classification
      Throws:
      IllegalArgumentException - if maturityStage is null or blank

    • normalize

      static String normalize(String maturityStage)
      Normalises a maturity stage string to a lower-case, underscore-separated identifier.
      Parameters:
      maturityStage - the raw maturity stage text; must not be null
      Returns:
      the normalised identifier
